Class Route

java.lang.Object
model.Route
public class Route extends Object
Represents a routing connection composed of two endpoints (locations) and the road connecting them.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Route(Location firstLocation, Location secondLocation, RoadType roadType, int speedLimit)
    Constructs a new Route between two locations, automatically calculating the physical length based on the Euclidean distance between their coordinates.

      private Road road

  • Constructor Details

    • Route

      public Route(Location firstLocation, Location secondLocation, RoadType roadType, int speedLimit)
      Constructs a new Route between two locations, automatically calculating the physical length based on the Euclidean distance between their coordinates.
      Parameters:
      firstLocation - The starting location.
      secondLocation - The destination location.
      roadType - The type of the road connecting them.
      speedLimit - The speed limit on this route.

  • Method Details

    • getFirstLocation

      public Location getFirstLocation()
      Retrieves the starting location of the route.
      Returns:
      The first Location.

    • setFirstLocation

      public void setFirstLocation(Location firstLocation)
      Sets the starting location of the route.
      Parameters:
      firstLocation - The new starting Location.

    • getSecondLocation

      public Location getSecondLocation()
      Retrieves the destination location of the route.
      Returns:
      The second Location.

    • setSecondLocation

      public void setSecondLocation(Location secondLocation)
      Sets the destination location of the route.
      Parameters:
      secondLocation - The new destination Location.

    • getRoad

      public Road getRoad()
      Retrieves the road entity associated with this route.
      Returns:
      The associated Road.

    • setRoad

      public void setRoad(Road road)
      Sets the road entity associated with this route.
      Parameters:
      road - The new Road.
